seoTitle: Shorten a Microsoft Forms Sharing Link
metaDescription: Compress a long, messy Microsoft Forms URL into a clean short link using the built-in Shorten URL toggle, no third-party tool required.
intro: A raw Microsoft Forms link full of tracking parameters looks unprofessional and wraps awkwardly in emails or social posts. Forms includes a native compression toggle that generates a clean, short forms.office.com/r/ address without needing a third-party link shortener.

steps.heading: Open the sharing drawer
steps.body: Open your form and click Collect Responses in the upper-right corner.

steps.heading: Find the long default link
steps.body: Notice the default sharing link displaying a long string of parameters inside the configuration drawer.

steps.heading: Toggle Shorten URL
steps.body: Check the Shorten URL box directly beneath the address field to instantly compress the link.

steps.heading: Copy the clean link
steps.body: Click Copy Link to grab the optimized, shortened submission link to your clipboard.

steps.heading: Distribute your link
steps.body: Paste the clean link into emails, Teams chats, or marketing channels, and note that the QR code updates automatically too.

faq.question: Do I need a third-party tool to shorten a Forms link?
faq.answer: No, the built-in Shorten URL checkbox handles this natively within the sharing drawer.

faq.question: Is a shortened link less secure than the original?
faq.answer: No, native shortened links still maintain your organization's domain authority and protect participant privacy records.

faq.question: Does shortening the link affect the generated QR code?
faq.answer: Yes, the QR code automatically adjusts its density to match the shortened link, making it easier to scan.

faq.question: Can I switch back to the full link later?
faq.answer: Yes, unchecking the Shorten URL box reverts the display back to the original long address.
